titleStmt.title: SII 28.23: original edition by J. Sundaram
No. 23. (A.R. No. 23 of 1913.) ĀḌUTUṞAI, PERAMBALUR TALUK, TIRUCHIRAPPALLI DISTRICT.

summary.p: Aparādhakshamēśvara Temple-Central Shrine, north and west bases

Again the scribe remained neutral while giving the succession title of the king and wrote kō-Pa-Rājakēsari-varman. This record has links with No. 22 above. Apparently the present record is the original royal order granting 20 vēli of land as dēvadāṉa-iṟai-ili (tax-free land in favour of the God) to God Tirukkuraṅgāḍu-tuṟai-uḍaiya-Mahādēvar at Iṟaiyān-puñchey in Ugaḻūr-kūṟṟam alias Tenūr-vāḍakai in ••••• chōḻa-vaḷanāḍu and No. 21 was an executive order. The contribution due per vēli was twenty kalam. This record states that if in respect of this land nilōpadi māḍai was to be accounted for it may be done (churukkuga) by the ūr (The meaning of these technical expressions is not clear).

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . pūmevivaḷar tiruppon mārvu puṇara nāmevu kalaimakaḷ nalam peritu ciṟappa vicaiyamāmakaḷ velpuyattiruppa ticaiyuñcellāṇa ṭicai viḷaṅka nirupar vantiṟaiñca niṇila maṭa vaḷara taruma maṇi muṭikavitteṉa maṇimuṭicūṭi mallai ñālattu pallūrkkellām Ellaiyilinpama Iyal vinileyti veṇkuṭai niḻaṟkiḻ ce
ṅ kolocci vāḻi pallāḻi Āḻi naṭappa cempon virasiṅhācanattu puvana muḻutuṭaiyāḷoṭum viṟṟiruntaruḷiya koparājakecari panma rāṉa tripuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ śrīkulottuṅkacoḻa devaṟku ya coḻavaḷanāṭṭu Ukaḷūr kūṟṟamān tenūr vāṭakai Iṟaiyān puṉceyt tirukkuraṅkāṭutuṟai Uṭaiya mahātevarkku veṇṭu nimattaṅkaḷukku Iṟuppatāka In�
aticūtamaṅkalattu nirnilattu Oru pattumaṭaiya yāṇṭu nālāvatu mutal tevatāṉa Iṟaiyili Iṭṭa nilam Irupatiṟṟu velikku yāṇṭu nālāvatu mutal veli Oṉṟukku nellu Irupatin kalamā nellu ṉānūṟṟukkalamum yāṇṭu nālāvatu mutal devatāṉa Iṟaiyili Iṭṭamaikku Inṉilattukku nilavopāti māṭaikku kaṇakku kaṇṭāl Immāṭai Ūril curukkuṟa
Ivai puraari śrīkaraṇamukaveṭṭi talai ṉūruṭaiyāṉ Eḻuttu Ivai puraari śrīkaraṇattu mukaveṭṭi vāṭkai Uṭaiyān Eḻuttu Ivai puraari śrīkaraṇanāyakam poṉṉuḻan Eḻuttu Ivaipuraari [ kamra Iḷaṅ] kākuṭaiyān Eḻuttu śrīkaraṇattu mukaveṭṭi tañcāvūr kiḻavaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai kaḷappāḷarājan Eḻuttu Ivai viyaṉāṭṭarayaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai
cittarājan Eḻuttu Ivai puraariśrī karaṇanāyakam vāṇikaṉeḻuttu Ivai puraariśrīkaraṇaṉāyakam panta vaḷanallūruṭaiyān Eḻuttu Ivai puraariśrīkaraṇattu mukaveṭṭi ten kaṅka Inilam variyili punceyāContinuation lost.
Digital edition of SII 28.23 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
